name: @stock-flow/nest-schematics
description: Custom NestJS schematics for Stock Flow

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/schematics/zod/template && cp src/schematics/zod/template/*.template dist/schematics/zod/template/ && cp src/schematics/zod/schema.json dist/schematics/zod/schema.json
scripts.pack: bun run build && npm pack && mv *.tgz my-nest-schematics.tgz
